headline: NTRS Q2 Earnings Beat on Higher NII & AUM Growth, Dividend Raised
summary: Northern Trust's Q2 results benefit from higher NII, fee income and AUM growth, while a dividend hike underscores capital strength.

raw.headline: NTRS Q2 Earnings Beat on Higher NII & AUM Growth, Dividend Raised
raw.summary: Northern Trust's Q2 results benefit from higher NII, fee income and AUM growth, while a dividend hike underscores capital strength.

headline: Bank of America Says the Fed Should Raise Rates Now: 4 Dividend Inflation-Resistant Stocks
summary: Bank of America is breaking with the Fed's wait-and-see approach and pushing for rate hikes now, which reshuffles the entire investing playbook. Four dividend-paying stocks across the sectors that quietly thrive when borrowing costs climb deserve a closer look.

raw.headline: Bank of America Says the Fed Should Raise Rates Now: 4 Dividend Inflation-Resistant Stocks
